version_description: I find these chords work in an open description and follow the lyrics well. There are numerous differences to previous chords.

versions.version_description: Well-aligned and readable chords for the whole song / suggestions for playable voicings /.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[intro]

[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Amaj7[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]   [ch]Dm6[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] 

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
These are the days of the open hand[/tab]

They will not be the last
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
Look around now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm6[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
These are the days of the beggars and the choosers[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
This is the year of the hungry man[/tab]

Whose place is in the past
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
Hand in hand with ignorance[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm6[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]   
And legitimate excuses[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
The rich declare themselves poor[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
And most of us are not sure[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
If we have too much[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
But we'll take our chances[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
Because god's stopped keeping score[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
I guess somewhere along the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
He must have let us all out to play[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Turned his back and all god's children[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
Crept out the back door[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
And it's hard to love, there's so much to hate[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
Hanging on to hope[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm6[/ch]
When there is no hope to speak of[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]Amaj7[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]
And the wounded skies above say it's much, much too late[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm6[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch] 
Well maybe we should all be praying for time[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
These are the days of the empty hand[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A7[/ch]
Oh you hold on to what you can[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm6[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]  
And charity is a coat you wear twice a year[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
This is the year of the guilty man[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]A7[/ch]
Your television takes a stand[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Dm6[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]            
And you find that what was over there is over here[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
So you scream from behind your door[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Say "what's mine is mine and not yours"[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
I may have too much but i'll take my chances[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
Because god's stopped keeping score[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
And you cling to the things they sold you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Did you cover your eyes when they told you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
That he can't come back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]E7[/ch]
Because he has no children to come back for[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
And it's hard to love, there's so much to hate[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
Hanging on to hope[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm6[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]   
When there is no hope to speak of[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]                         [ch]A7[/ch]
And the wounded skies above say it's much, much too late[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm6[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Well maybe we should all be praying for time[/tab]

[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Amaj7[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]   [ch]Dm6[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
